recommendations.title: In a Better World
recommendations.overview: The lives of two Danish families cross each other, and an extraordinary but risky friendship comes into bud. But loneliness, frailty and sorrow lie in wait.

recommendations.title: After the Wedding
recommendations.overview: A manager of an orphanage in India is sent to Copenhagen, Denmark, where he discovers a life-altering family secret.

recommendations.title: Open Hearts
recommendations.overview: Cecilie and Joachim are about to get married when a freak car accident leaves Joachim disabled, throwing their lives into a spin. The driver of the other car, Marie, and her family don’t get off lightly, either. Her husband Niels works in the hospita

recommendations.title: Things We Lost in the Fire
recommendations.overview: A recent widow invites her husband's troubled best friend to live with her and her two children. As he gradually turns his life around, he helps the family cope and confront their loss.

recommendations.title: Bird Box
recommendations.overview: Five years after an ominous unseen presence drives most of society to suicide, a survivor and her two children make a desperate bid to reach safety.

recommendations.title: Brothers
recommendations.overview: A Danish officer, Michael, is sent away to the International Security Assistance Force operation in Afghanistan for three months. His first mission there is to find a young radar technician who had been separated from his squad some days earlier. Whi

recommendations.title: Serena
recommendations.overview: North Carolina mountains at the end of the 1920s – George and Serena Pemberton, love-struck newly-weds, begin to build a timber empire. Serena soon proves herself to be equal to any man: overseeing loggers, hunting rattle-snakes, even saving a man’s

recommendations.title: Lion
recommendations.overview: A five-year-old Indian boy gets lost on the streets of Calcutta, thousands of kilometers from home. He survives many challenges before being adopted by a couple in Australia; 25 years later, he sets out to find his lost family.

recommendations.title: A Second Chance
recommendations.overview: Detectives and best friends Andreas and Simon lead vastly different lives; Andreas has settled down with his beautiful wife and son; while Simon, recently divorced, spends most of his waking hours getting drunk at the local strip club. But all that c

recommendations.title: Beautiful Lies
recommendations.overview: A hairdresser forwards a passionate love letter to her widowed mother.
